resource.name: Err.DeletingStationChildren
resource.object: Can't delete children of the station

resource.name: Err.DeletingStationData
resource.object: Can't delete station. Station has data.

resource.name: CardData.WeigherConfig
resource.object: before the weigher tracks can be configured

resource.name: CardData.DataSaved
resource.object: before the weigher system can be saved

resource.name: CardData.Text.Single
resource.object: The following property need to be defined

resource.name: CardData.Text.Multi
resource.object: The following properties need to be defined

resource.name: Save.Text
resource.object: Do you want to save the data?

resource.name: colLine.ToolTip
resource.object: Name of the line the device is part of

resource.name: colDevice.ToolTip
resource.object: Shows the name of the device

resource.name: colConnection.ToolTip
resource.object: Shows the connection status of the device

resource.name: colPerformanceMon.ToolTip
resource.object: Deviation percentage of the actual empty shackle SD compared to the configured global empty shackle SD

resource.name: colEmptyShackle.ToolTip
resource.object: Standard deviation in the weight of all shackles in the line

resource.name: colShackleMon.ToolTip
resource.object: Percentage of good shackles in the line

resource.name: colActWeight.ToolTip
resource.object: The actual weight of the shackle

resource.name: colLogging.ToolTip
resource.object: Indicates if logging is currently active

resource.name: colLineRunning.ToolTip
resource.object: Indicates if the line is running

resource.name: colTrackName.ToolTip
resource.object: Shows the name of the track as defined in Innova

resource.name: colError.ToolTip
resource.object: Show last inner error for the track

resource.name: barBtnRefresh.Hint
resource.object: Refresh and reload the grids data

resource.name: barBtnMws2Management.Hint
resource.object: Opens the MWS2 management dialog for calibration and scoping

resource.name: colTareRoundsLearned.ToolTip
resource.object: Shows the number of rounds learned

resource.name: colBadRoundsLearned.ToolTip
resource.object: Shows the number of rounds learned

resource.name: colLogRegTime.ToolTip
resource.object: Time when entry was written to database

resource.name: colLogActualTare.ToolTip
resource.object: The actual weigh of the tare

resource.name: colLogRoundsLearned.ToolTip
resource.object: Shows the number of rounds learned

resource.name: edLoggingRatio.Hint
resource.object: Log each N'th shackle instead of every shackle (1 = all shackles)

resource.name: RemoteError.Text
resource.object: No remote connection to the server

resource.name: Logging.DelLog
resource.object: Do you want to delete the log entry:\n'{0}'\nfrom the database?

resource.name: edLoggingName.Hint
resource.object: Type a name for the log. If no name is supplied a name will be created automatically.

resource.name: staticWeight.ToolTip
resource.object: The static weight of the shackle

resource.name: cbLoggingHistory.Hint
resource.object: List of available logs to select from

resource.name: barBtnSave.Hint
resource.object: Save the selected log to a file

resource.name: barBtnSaveTareGrid.Hint
resource.object: Save the content of the tare table to file

resource.name: barBtnSaveBadShackleGrid.Hint
resource.object: Save the content of the bad shackel table to file

resource.name: ResetShackle.Confirm
resource.object: The individual tare of selected shackles will be relearned.\nDo you want to continue?

resource.name: ResetBadShackles.Confirm
resource.object: The individual tare of all bad shackles will be relearned.\nDo you want to continue?

resource.name: ResetAllShackle.Confirm
resource.object: The individual tare and global tare of all shackles in the line will be relearned.\nDo you want to continue?

resource.name: barBtnRestoreDefLayout.Hint
resource.object: Restore default layouts of UI items

resource.name: WgmStationNotPresent
resource.object: Wgm Station not present in server application. Is the license installed?

resource.name: colStatus.ToolTip
resource.object: Shows the status of the settings

resource.name: colTrack.ToolTip
resource.object: Name of the weight track handling this device

resource.name: colDownloadDate.ToolTip
resource.object: Date and time when settings were send to device

resource.name: colTareBackup.ToolTip
resource.object: Date and time when tare data was backuped from the device

resource.name: colDevice.ToolTip
resource.object: Shows the name of the device the settings are for

resource.name: lblClearProdNoOfShackles.Text
resource.object: Number of shackles after det/pp alarm comes up

resource.name: lblAddProdNoOfShackles.Text
resource.object: Number of shackles after det/pp alarm comes up

resource.name: chkAddProdDisable.Text
resource.object: Disable product assignment after an alarm

resource.name: lblAddGiblet.Text
resource.object: Add for giblet to article code

resource.name: lblNoOvershootsAllowed.Text
resource.object: Number of overshoots allowed in history before alarm

resource.name: lblNoBarsForHistory.Text
resource.object: Numbers of bars used for history

resource.name: lblNoBarsOutsideRange.Text
resource.object: Number of bars outside the range allowed before alarm occurs

resource.name: chkUseProdEfficiency.Text
resource.object: Use product efficiency outside range alarm

resource.name: lblProdEffOutsideLimitHysteresis.Text
resource.object: Product efficiency outside range limit hysteresis

resource.name: chkSuppressAlarm.Text
resource.object: Suppress alarm when line speed is unstable

resource.name: lblIndTareRoundsNeeded.Text
resource.object: Min empty rounds for initial learning

resource.name: Hint.Different
resource.object: Settings between TAP and Innova are different

resource.name: Save.Text
resource.object: Do you want to save data?

resource.name: Send.Confirm
resource.object: Do you want to send settings for currently selected device?

resource.name: SendError.Text
resource.object: No remote connection to the server.

resource.name: TareBackup.Failed
resource.object: Failed to send tare table backup request

resource.name: TareRestore.Failed
resource.object: Failed to send tare table restore request

resource.name: RemoteError.Text
resource.object: No remote connection to the server.

resource.name: TareAutoBackup.Failed
resource.object: Failed to update table backup settings

resource.name: colTareRestore.ToolTip
resource.object: Date and time when tare data was restored

resource.name: colLine.ToolTip
resource.object: Shows the line as defined in Top

resource.name: SettingsSave.Error
resource.object: No settings data found in the database.

resource.name: barBtnTareLoad.Hint
resource.object: Load tare data from file to be restored to the device

resource.name: barBtnTareSave.Hint
resource.object: Save backuped tare data to a file

resource.name: TareSave.Error
resource.object: No data for tare table backup found in the database.

resource.name: TareLoad.Confirm
resource.object: Do you want to load a tare data from a file and restore it to the device?

resource.name: TareLoad.Result.Text
resource.object: Check if you have selected correct file.

resource.name: TareLoad.Restore.Failed
resource.object: Failed to restore tare table data from file

resource.name: barBtnTareBackup.Hint
resource.object: Backup tare table data from TAP to database

resource.name: barBtnTareRestore.Hint
resource.object: Restore backuped tare data from database to TAP

resource.name: barBtnRestoreDefLayout.Hint
resource.object: Restore default layouts of UI items

resource.name: edIndTareShacklesAllowed.ToolTip
resource.object: Defines at which level of filled shackles the weigher can start the learning proces for individual tare.

resource.name: lblBadShackleListThreshold.Text
resource.object: Rejection threshold for bad shackle table

resource.name: edAlarmThresholdShacklesInRound.ToolTip
resource.object: An alarm is generated if the percentage of rejected shackles in one round is higher than this value

resource.name: edAlarmThresholdIndShackle.ToolTip
resource.object: An alarm is generated if an individual shackle rejection percentage is higher than this value

resource.name: edBadShackleListThreshold.ToolTip
resource.object: A shackle is added to the bad shackle list if the individual shackle rejection percentage is higher than this value

resource.name: edBadShackleResetThreshold.ToolTip
resource.object: The individual tare of a shackle is reset if the individual shackle rejection percentage is higher than this value

resource.name: edTareBackupInterval.ToolTip
resource.object: The interval with which the individual tare data is retrieved from the TAP and backupped to the database

resource.name: edIndTareRoundsNeeded.ToolTip
resource.object: The number of rounds needed for learning the individual tare

resource.name: edIndTareKFactor.ToolTip
resource.object: Each new empty shackle weight is damped with this factor before it is used in the recursive filter for individual tare calculation

resource.name: edGlobalTareActualPlus.ToolTip
resource.object: An alarm is generated if the global tare exceed this threshold, positive or negative

resource.name: edEmptyShackleWeight.ToolTip
resource.object: Estimation of the empty shackle weight, used for tare calculation. Individual tare plus this value determines real shackle weight

resource.name: edMinLineSpeed.ToolTip
resource.object: The minimum line speed for learning the tare

resource.name: edEmptyShackleSD.ToolTip
resource.object: The maximum empty shackle standard deviation used for the performance monitor

resource.name: edTareRejection.ToolTip
resource.object: If the tare of the shackle deviates more than this value from the actual tare, the shackle is rejected for the individual and global tare calculation

resource.name: edIpAddress.ToolTip
resource.object: The IP address of the MWS2 device for TAP to use when creating the connection

resource.name: edPortNo.ToolTip
resource.object: The port number of the MWS2 device for TAP to use when creating the connection

resource.name: edGlobalTareShacklesNeeded.ToolTip
resource.object: The number of shackles that are used in the moving average global tare calculation

resource.name: Send.Failed.Text
resource.object: Please check the system log for more informations.

resource.name: Send.SaveConfirm
resource.object: Do you want to save the data and\nsend settings for currently selected device?

resource.name: barBtnResetBadShackles.ToolTip
resource.object: Relearns all the bad shackles in the system

resource.name: barBtnResetAllShackles.ToolTip
resource.object: Relearns the whole line, this is bad and good shackles

resource.name: edClearProdPerc.ToolTip
resource.object: The percentage of shackles wich should trigger the alarm

resource.name: chkClearProdAllow.ToolTip
resource.object: When enabled product clearing is allowed

resource.name: chkClearProdDisable.ToolTip
resource.object: When enabled no products will be cleared when a alarm has been raised

resource.name: edAddProdPerc.ToolTip
resource.object: The percentage of shackles wich should trigger the alarm

resource.name: chkAddProdAllow.ToolTip
resource.object: When enabled product assignment is allowed

resource.name: chkAddProdDisable.ToolTip
resource.object: When enabled no products are assigned after a alarm has been raised

resource.name: edAddProdWeight.ToolTip
resource.object: The weight of the product to add

resource.name: edAddProdQuality.ToolTip
resource.object: The quality of the product to add

resource.name: edAddProdArticle.ToolTip
resource.object: The article code of the product to add

resource.name: edPHMinProductWeight.ToolTip
resource.object: The minimum product weight to register

resource.name: edPHOffset.ToolTip
resource.object: The offset used for registering weight

resource.name: edPHCorrFactor.ToolTip
resource.object: The percentage that should be used for the correction factor

resource.name: chkPHDisplace.ToolTip
resource.object: When enabled a certain number of shackles is displaced

resource.name: edPHDisplaceShackles.ToolTip
resource.object: The number of shackles to displace

resource.name: selTreatments.ToolTip
resource.object: Defines the type of weigher, left leg, right leg or whole product

resource.name: chkUseGiblet.ToolTip
resource.object: Defines if the giblets should be used in the weighing

resource.name: edGibletWeight.ToolTip
resource.object: The weight of the giblet which should be used

resource.name: TareBackup
resource.object: Are you sure you want to backup the currently existing tare table from the TAP system?

resource.name: TareRestore
resource.object: Are you sure you want to restore the currently backupped tare table to the TAP system?

resource.name: colLogRegTime.ToolTip
resource.object: Time when entry was written to database

resource.name: colLogActualTare.ToolTip
resource.object: The actual weigh of the tare

resource.name: colLogRoundsLearned.ToolTip
resource.object: Shows the number of rounds learned

resource.name: TestError.ParamFailed
resource.object: Unable to start the performance test, check params

resource.name: TestError.FailedToStart
resource.object: Unable to start the performance test

resource.name: TestError.NoServer
resource.object: Unable to start the test, no connection to server

resource.name: TestError.FailedToStop
resource.object: Unable to stop the performance test

resource.name: Logging.DelLog
resource.object: Do you want to delete the log entry:\n'{0}'\nfrom the database?

resource.name: Test.Info
resource.object: Set test parameters and click start to start the test

resource.name: weigherList.ToolTip
resource.object: Select weigher to do test for

resource.name: btnSave.ToolTip
resource.object: Save the selected log to a file

resource.name: edNoOfBirds.ToolTip
resource.object: Specifies how many birds should be dropped

resource.name: edDropsPerMin.ToolTip
resource.object: Specifies the number of birds to drop per minute

resource.name: edMinWeight.ToolTip
resource.object: The minimum weight specification of a bird to be dropped

resource.name: edMaxWeight.ToolTip
resource.object: The maximum weight specification of a bird to be dropped

resource.name: edLogName.ToolTip
resource.object: The name of the logging belong to the to be executed performance test.

resource.name: startStopButton.ToolTip
resource.object: Activate performance test or stop if it is running

resource.name: barBtnRefresh.Hint
resource.object: Refresh setup and data from device

resource.name: barBtnRestoreDefLayout.Hint
resource.object: Restore default layouts of UI items

resource.name: barBtnLoad.Hint
resource.object: Load register settings from a local file.

resource.name: barBtnSave.Hint
resource.object: Save register settings to a local file.

resource.name: barBtnGetSettings.Hint
resource.object: Import register settings for selected MWS2 weigher.

resource.name: colStatus.Hint
resource.object: Shows the status of the settings

resource.name: colTrack.ToolTip
resource.object: Name of the weight track handling this device

resource.name: colDownloadDate.ToolTip
resource.object: Date and time when settings where send to device

resource.name: colPropContentDb.ToolTip
resource.object: Shows the parameters saved in database

resource.name: Info.Refresh.Text
resource.object: Getting data from MWS2 device.\nPlease wait!

resource.name: Save.Text
resource.object: Do you want to save data?

resource.name: Hint.Different
resource.object: Settings between MWS2 and Innova are different

resource.name: Load.Text
resource.object: Data in the grid and in database will be overwritten.\nDo you want to continue?

resource.name: DifferentIp.Text
resource.object: The IP address from the database differs from the ip on the device.\nThis may result in an inaccessible device.\nDo you want to continue?

resource.name: DifferentIp.Caption
resource.object: Different IP address device and database

resource.name: RemoteError.Text
resource.object: No remote connection to the server.

resource.name: Send.Info
resource.object: Sending data to MWS2 device.\nPlease wait!

resource.name: Send.Confirm
resource.object: Do you want to send settings for currently selected device?

resource.name: SaveDialog.Info
resource.object: Data need to be saved to database before it is exported.

resource.name: colDevice.ToolTip
resource.object: Shows the name of the device the settings are for

resource.name: colLine.ToolTip
resource.object: Shows the line as defined in Top

resource.name: Send.SaveConfirm
resource.object: Do you want to save the data and\nsend settings for currently selected device?

resource.name: Send.ConfirmOpen
resource.object: Do you want to send settings for currently selected device? \nWarning: All records will be overwritten on the device

resource.name: Send.SaveConfirmOpen
resource.object: Do you want to save the data and\nsend settings for currently selected device? \nWarning: All records will be overwritten on the device

resource.name: SendProtectedSettings
resource.object: Allow to overwrite protected MWS2 parameters

resource.name: LoadCellWrongConnected
resource.object: Loadcell proberly wrong connected, please check the connections.

resource.name: RemoteError
resource.object: An error occured during the calibration process. See system log.

resource.name: curWeightInfo.ToolTip
resource.object: Shown weight may not be accurate until calibration process is finished

resource.name: Action.Start
resource.object: In order to start the calibration procedure, fill in the calibration weight and press the button "Start calibration".

resource.name: Action.Restart
resource.object: In order to restart the calibration procedure, fill in the calibration weight and press the button "Restart calibration".

resource.name: Action.WaitEmptyWeight
resource.object: Make sure no weight is present and press the button "Next step".

resource.name: Action.WaitCalibrationWeight
resource.object: Place the calibration weight and press the button "Next step".

resource.name: Action.WaitConfirmation
resource.object: Press the button "Confirm calibration" in order to store the new calibration.

resource.name: Calibration.StartError
resource.object: Please supply a valid calibration weight.

resource.name: Calibration.StartErrorRunningLine
resource.object: Smartweigher calibration cannot be started on a running line.

resource.name: Calibration.StartErrorDisconnectedClient
resource.object: Remote client is null, please check the connectivity!

resource.name: btnPrevStep.ToolTip
resource.object: Go back to previouse step in the process

resource.name: btnNextStep.ToolTip
resource.object: Go to next step in the calibration process

resource.name: Error.ScopeDataCollection
resource.object: An error occured during scope data request. Please verify device connection.

resource.name: Error.Chart.Binding
resource.object: Error occured while processing the data

resource.name: FileDlg.Title
resource.object: Select location for saving scope image

resource.name: btnSettings.ToolTip
resource.object: Open settings dialog for the scope

resource.name: btnSave.ToolTip
resource.object: Save the scope image to file

resource.name: selLog.ToolTip
resource.object: Choose a log to view as a scope image

resource.name: edScopeWindow.ToolTip
resource.object: The amount of milliseconds that need to be scoped

resource.name: chkSyncScope.ToolTip
resource.object: If checked a amount of milliseconds is logged before the first trigger, else all data will be logged from the moment the scoping has been started

resource.name: edPresampleTime.ToolTip
resource.object: The amount of milliseconds to show before the first trigger

resource.name: chkUseFixedWindow.ToolTip
resource.object: If checked this allows to limit the y-axis range

resource.name: edVertMin.ToolTip
resource.object: The minimum value on the y-axis

resource.name: edVertMax.ToolTip
resource.object: The maximum value on the y-axis

resource.name: chkUseLogging.ToolTip
resource.object: If checked, the datapoints of the scope are logged in the database

resource.name: Logging.DelLog
resource.object: Do you want to delete the log entry:\n'{0}'\nfrom the database?

resource.name: btnSave.ToolTip
resource.object: Save the selected log to a file

resource.name: colLogLoadCellWeight.ToolTip
resource.object: The weight on the load cell

resource.name: colLogShackleId.ToolTip
resource.object: The id of the shackle that is was being weighed

resource.name: colLogStartSensorState.ToolTip
resource.object: 1 if start sensor is active, 0 when not

resource.name: colLogStopSensorState.ToolTip
resource.object: 1 if stop sensor is active, 0 when not

resource.name: colLogTime.ToolTip
resource.object: The time in ms measured from the start of the scope data collection

resource.name: colLogTotalWeight.ToolTip
resource.object: Load cell weight minus vibration cell weight

resource.name: colLogVibrationCellWeight.ToolTip
resource.object: The weight on the vibration cell

resource.name: colLogWeighing.ToolTip
resource.object: Indicates if the weigher is actually collecting weight data that is processed further

resource.name: Error.Mws2DataRetrieval
resource.object: Error occured while getting data for MWS2

resource.name: Error.TapDataRetrieval
resource.object: Error occured while getting data for TAP

resource.name: colSWTime.ToolTip
resource.object: Date/time when weight was received by server

resource.name: barBtnStartGetStaticWeight.Hint
resource.object: Start / Stop requesting static weight (max 10 minutes)

resource.name: barBtnStartLogging.Hint
resource.object: Start / Stop logging of static weight

resource.name: barBtnSave.Hint
resource.object: lick to save the data to a disk

resource.name: barBtnClear.Hint
resource.object: Click to clear the content of the table

resource.name: Firmware.NoFirmwareSelected
resource.object: Upgrade cannot start, please select a firmware file.

resource.name: Firmware.ExceptionReadingFirmwareFile
resource.object: An exception occured while loading the file content. See log for more detail.

resource.name: RemoteError
resource.object: An error occured during the firmware upgrade process. See system log.

resource.name: Firmware.UpgradeInProgress
resource.object: Please wait while the firmware is upgraded.

resource.name: Firmware.Mws2NotInitialized
resource.object: Currently it is not possible to read MWS2 registers, therefore the firmware upgrade cannot start. This may take several minutes.

resource.name: Upgrade.Confirm
resource.object: This will overwrite the current firmware version are you sure?

resource.name: Upgrade.NoRemoteOpenMode
resource.object: This firmware version does not allow to set the MWS2 in open modus remotely, please set the open modus on the MWS2 itself (See the MWS2 manual for further instructions). \nPress OK when the MWS2 is in open mode, then the current firmware version will be overwritten. \nPress Cancel to stop the firmware upgrade
